about.title: About RUBLI
about.description: RUBLI (Red Unificada de Busqueda de Licitaciones Irregulares) is an AI-Powered Corruption Detection Platform for Mexican Government Procurement. Named after the unified network concept for detecting irregular procurement patterns across federal sectors.
